case_title: BROADCAST MUSIC, INC. A NEW YORK CORPORATION VS. 1 PRODUCTION SF, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED et al

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR APR-03-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-09-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. PETITIONER BROADCAST MUSIC, INC. A NEW YORK CORPORATION'S NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS CONTINUED TO MAY 9, 2012. OPPOSITION TO BE FILED BY APRIL 23, 2012. REPLY TO BE FILED BY MAY 2, 2012. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD CSR #7077

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO OTHER APPEARANCE. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER BROADCAST MUSIC, INC.'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER BROADCAST MUSIC, INC. A NEW YORK CORPORATION DBA BMI RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT 1 PRODUCTION SF, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA ROCCAPULCO $9,661.99 PRINCIPAL, $186.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,460.42 INTEREST, $435.00 COSTS, $1,175.00 $775.00 ADM.
